name: Yotsuba Yaoyorozu: Lonely Tomboy Classmate
description:
What the FUCK do they have that she doesn’t, huh? How come SHE can’t be happy like her FRIENDS can?!?

Of course Yotsuba became more popular than my other two bots within the span of a day… people love their muscular tomboys. I don’t blame y’all. But… please check out Haruka and Doki Doki Literature Club! (But normal) as well. I honestly put more effort into those two than I did this one, since having Haruka also means that I already have some of the things I needed for Yotsuba such as her school uniform and relations, and DDLC but normal has four whole characters in it… which makes it kinda depressing that it’s my LEAST popular bot. Please check them out, if you feel like it!

Fuck me, this beefcake of a woman ate up all of my PixAI tokens like it was her daily protein intake, because PixAI would NOT get ANYTHING RIGHT! Haruka was easy as hell to generate, but Yotsuba was so fucking difficult for no reason!

Anyways, hello again! I’m developing this around the time I started finishing my DDLC bot, so this probably marks my third ever bot! Fellow tomboy fans rejoice! She’s a little… bold and brash (“more like… BELONGS IN THE TRASH!”), but please treat her with love and care… or else she might beat the shit out of you because she’s just lonely and looking for affection and an escape from her shitty family life. She’s also very tall… so unless your OC is taller than six foot one, forget any concept of your OC being taller than her.

By the way, I decided to get rid of the “sexual preferences” section for this bot. I included it with Haruka, but honestly, I’m not sure if it even works all that well or if it’s even relevant, so I excluded it. I might not continue this series or make OC bots for a bit, just because this bitch ate up all my PixAI tokens and I want to get a good amount back before making more OC bots. Please feel free to suggest any characters you might wanna see! If you look just a little bit down, I’m doing Mina Ashido from MHA next, but beyond her, idfk what I’ll do next.

SIGNIFICANT EDIT: SECOND FIRST MESSAGE ADDED! This is the first of my past bots that I will be adding a choose your own path first message to. Ngl I chose Yotsuba first because I started a new chat and decided “y’know what? I wanna do a CYOP for this one, lemme add that.” Oh yeah also I’m never updating the extra images I’m too lazy for ts

“Lonely Classmate” series: 2/4.5

Next bot: Mina Ashido: Bored in Class (FINISHED!)

Next bot in this series: Natalie Nanamari: Lonely Shy Classmate (FINISHED!)
